projects.title: African Supermarket
projects.description: A modern e-commerce platform for an African themed supermarket built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS. Features include cart system, search and categories.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A personal portfolio website showcasing my projects and skills as a developer. Built with semantic HTML and external CSS.

projects.title: Weather App
projects.description: A weather application that fetches real time data from an external API and displays forecasts for any city in the world.

projects.title: Task Manager
projects.description: A task management application with drag and drop functionality, categories and due dates to help users stay organized.
